name: Grilled Chayote Squash (or Pear Fruit)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dice the chayote squash.
2. Season with fresh cracked pepper to taste.
3. Add a splash of olive oil and 2 pinches of mozzarella cheese.
4. Place in an aluminum foil pan and grill on a covered charcoal grill, away from the coals.
